title: VaultBackend::put with ?field= clobbering behavior is undocumented
description: The module doc says field is 'required for put; optional for get' but says nothing about what put actually does to the other fields in the KV secret. A user reading the docs will assume put updates one field in-place. The KV v2 set call replaces the entire data map. The put() method doc should say: 'Warning: writes a single-field map {field: value} as a new KV version. Any other fields in the existing secret are not preserved.' Until the raw-HTTP rewrite (issue crate-secretsx-hpx) enables read-modify-write, this needs a prominent doc warning.
